parties.name: ANSELMO, RICHARD 533 DIVISIDERO, #4 SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94117

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar May-02-2003 Vacated

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-02-2003 Vacated
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for settlement conference this day.
Commissioner: Sue M. Kaplan, Clerks, S. Ravinantapricha/P. Dias, CSR. Deberah Neville.
Plaintiff: Adham Ran Ibrahim Nasser present in pro per.
Defendant: Richard Anselmo present in pro per.
Parties met in chambers and reached a settlement, terms of settlement were read into the record for the parties by comm. Kaplan in open court as follows: Parties entered into a stipulated future judgment. Plaintiff will be entitled to restitution and possession of property located at 533 Divisadero #4, San Francisco, CA. Lease forfeited. Defendant is allowed to remain in possession of the premise until 5 p.m.of May 31,2003. If defendant vacates, plaintiff to dismiss with prejudice. If defendant fail to vacate, plaintiff will entitled to judgment of possession and restitution, and money judgment of $2,497.09 for past due rent and damages, $115.30 in costs. Parties waive any and all claim against the other, each side will bear its own costs and attorney fees. Security deposit handled according to state law. Defendant to vacates with broom clean condition, any items left in premises will be disposed of. If defendant fail to comply with the agreement, plaintiff may seek an ex parte motion for amended judgment and writ of execution upon a 24 hours ex parte notice to the defendant.
All parties agreed to terms of the settlement in open court and not reduced to writting.
